projects.name: telnet-gui
projects.description: Lisp scriptable multi-platform telnet client with its own terminal emulator. Built for MUD games. Inspired by DIKU days. Superseded by Mudlark — left for posterity.

projects.name: cb
projects.description: Codeberg (Forgejo) repository management CLI written in C11.

projects.name: Spool
projects.description: GNOME mail app inspired by Mutt and Emacs/Gnus/Rmail.

projects.name: Firefox Markdown Viewer
projects.description: A Firefox extension that renders GitHub Flavored Markdown files directly in the browser.

projects.name: Subgrab
projects.description: CLI to search and download movie subtitles from subf2m.co. Fuzzy/keyword search, 40+ languages, ZIP auto-extraction.
